about.metaTitle: About Nacho Rodriguez | Musician in Riviera Maya
about.metaDesc: Argentine singer-songwriter based in the Riviera Maya since 2014. Rock, blues, jazz and original songs for weddings and events.
story: I was born in Mendoza, Argentina, surrounded by mountains and wine, with the guitar as my companion since I was 12 years old.
In 2014 I made the decision to cross the continent to the Riviera Maya — and I have never regretted it. This region adopted me and I adopted it.

Today, after more than 10 years playing at weddings, boutique hotels, private villas, and exclusive events, I can say I found my place in the world: in front of a microphone, in front of people, in the Mexican Caribbean.
The Riviera Maya is my home, but I travel wherever I'm needed: I'm available for weddings and events anywhere in Mexico.

My music mixes who I am: the rock and folk from Argentina, the blues I learned listening to old vinyls, the jazz that taught me to improvise, and the tropical influence of Mexico that slowly found its way into my compositions.
about.musicText: In addition to playing at events, I compose and record my own songs. You can find them on Spotify and all streaming platforms.

tulum.desc: Tulum: bohemian, spiritual and spectacular. The villas in the hotel zone, the sacred cenotes, and the paradisiacal beaches deserve perfect music.

cancun.desc: Cancún concentrates the largest all-inclusive hotels in the Caribbean and an active destination wedding scene. I play throughout the hotel zone.
